army_customisation.intro:
Army Customisation allows you to further individualise your force. Archetypes change how you build your army by moving around units in the Army Organisation Plan (AOP) or letting you take more of a unit than you would normally be allowed to. Legacies give access to armories and disciplines of legendary factions. Traits enhance your units with special abilities that they normally would not be able to have.

You may select up to the following:
0-1 Archetype, 0-1 Legacy, 0-2 Traits

If a Trait is taken, all models / units in the army must be upgraded with it, unless stated otherwise.

archetypes.name: Farsight Enclave
archetypes.description:
- Crisis Battlesuits can be taken as Troops.
- Any other Troop unit becomes Elite choices.
- The army may not include Ethereals. 
- One unit each of Broadside Battlesuits and Riptide Battlesuits can be taken with an HQ slot if they consist of a single model.

archetypes.name: Kroot Hunting Pack
archetypes.description:
- Kroot Farstalkers gain the Objective Secured ability.
- One Kroot Master Shaper may be upgraded to be a Shaman for +10 points. 
- A Kroot Shaman is a Psyker and can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows two powers from either the Biomancy or Divination disciplines.
- Only Kroot units count towards mandatory unit minimums in the army's AOP.
- Only Kroot units count towards the 25% Troops limitation.

archetypes.name: Stealth Cadre
archetypes.description:
- Stealth Battlesuits can be taken as Troops.
- Stealth Battlesuits may equip each model with a Fusion blaster at the regular cost.
- Any other Troop unit becomes an Elite choice.
- For every 6 models of Stealth Shas'ui and/or Stealth Shas'vre, one Ghostkeel Battlesuit unit may be taken as Troops.
- Must select at least one Commander equipped with a XV22 Stalker battlesuit.

legacies.name: Devastating Counterstrike
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Farsight Enclaves in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Hunter's Instincts
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Kroot Kindred in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Masters of Urban Warfare
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Sa’cea Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Strength of Conviction
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the T'au Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Strike Fast
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Vior’la Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Superior Craftsmanship
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Bork’an Sept in the Sept Armory.

legacies.name: Unifying Influence
legacies.description: The army has access to equipment from the Dal’yth Sept in the Sept Armory.

traits.name: Advanced Miniaturization
traits.description: Every modell with access to a SUPPORT SYSTEM may pick one additional SUPPORT SYSTEM at the regular cost.

traits.name: Blacklight Markers
traits.description: All markerlights of the unit increase their range by 12". Only for units with at least one Markerlight.

traits.name: Calm under Pressure
traits.description: The unit does not suffer the to hit penalty from Defensive Fire.

traits.name: Camouflage Experts
traits.description: The unit gains the benefit of light cover until its first activation.

traits.name: Combined Expansion
traits.description: The army must select a second Legacy. Each model may only select items from one Legacy armory.

traits.name: Defenders of the Cause
traits.description: The unit's "Supporting Fire" ability increases its range to 12".

traits.name: Defensive Doctrines
traits.description: If the unit gets charged by an enemy unit, all enemy melee weapons reduce their AP and AT by 1 to a minimum of 0.

traits.name: Disengangement Protocols
traits.description: Roll 1D6 every time the unit tries to flee from melee combat. One enemy unit in direct base contact suffers the result as automatic wounds with S:4 AP:0 D:1.

traits.name: Evasive Maneuvers
traits.description: If the unit moved at least 12" away from its current position at the beginning of the battle round, all models gain the "Deflect" ability. Only for Jump Pack units.

traits.name: Fire Caste Marksman
traits.description: The unit gains the "Deflagrate(5+)" ability with Pulse weapons. Does not apply to "Heavy" weapons.

traits.name: Fire Saturation
traits.description: Burst weapons gain a +1 bonus to hit rolls against targets within 12".

traits.name: Reliable Weaponry
traits.description: The unit can re-roll one armor penetration or wound roll per activation.

traits.name: Signature Evolutionary Adaption
traits.description:
Select one Adaptation that must be applied to all Kroot units:
- Bold: The model gains +1 Leadership.
- Chameleon: The model gains the "Deflect" ability.
- Fast Reflexes: The model gains +1 Initiative.
- Hyperactive Nymune Organ: The model gains the "Frenzy(2")" ability.
- Ork Hybrid: The model gains +1 Toughness.
- Sixth Sense: The model gains a 6+ invulnerability save.

traits.name: Swarm Controllers
traits.description: Models with access to drones may buy up to three drones in any combination instead of two.

traits.name: Turbo Jets
traits.description: The unit gains +2" Movement. Only for Jump Pack units.
